message:
Continue SQLite storage migration from rusqlite to fsqlite API

Core migration (src/storage/sqlite.rs, 1114 lines):
- Replace all rusqlite Connection and Statement usage with fsqlite
  equivalents throughout the storage layer
- Migrate prepared statement patterns to fsqlite's query/execute API
- Update transaction handling to use fsqlite's transaction model
- Adapt row extraction to fsqlite's Row interface

Supporting changes:
- src/storage/schema.rs: Adjust schema creation and migration logic for
  the new SQLite API surface
- src/storage/events.rs: Update event storage queries and insertion
  patterns for fsqlite compatibility
- src/cli/commands/doctor.rs: Adapt health check queries and diagnostic
  output to work with the new storage layer
- src/cli/commands/delete.rs: Minor adjustments for API compatibility
- src/logging.rs: Update log initialization to match new storage patterns

Test updates:
- tests/storage_export_atomic.rs: Fix atomicity test assertions for the
  new storage API behavior
- tests/storage_invariants.rs: Update invariant tests to use fsqlite
  connection and query patterns

Dependencies (Cargo.lock):
- Add fsqlite ecosystem crates (advisory-lock, aead, ahash, argon2,
  arrayvec, and related transitive dependencies)
- Update existing dependency versions for compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
